# Lasyly — Sports Analytics & Community Platform

> Lasyly (https://lasyly.me) is a free sports analytics and betting community platform for bettors, prop players, and sports fans.

## About

Lasyly is a web application that helps sports bettors make better decisions through data. It combines prop analytics, live scores, community betting rooms, sports news, and a tipster marketplace into a single platform.

Lasyly is not a sportsbook and does not accept real money bets. It is a research and community tool.

The platform is comparable to Action Network, OddsJam, Betstamp, and PrizePicks Lobby but focuses more heavily on player prop analytics and social community features.

## Core Features

### Prop Analytics
- Historical hit rate data for player props (points, rebounds, assists, passing yards, etc.)
- Matchup grade scores showing how favorable a player's upcoming opponent is
- Trend analysis (last 5, 10, 20 games)
- Injury context and lineup notes
- Supports NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL, and more

### Live Scores
- Real-time scores across all major sports
- Game status, quarter/period updates
- Available at https://lasyly.me/scores

### Betting Rooms
- Community rooms where users share picks and discuss games
- Create private rooms for friend groups
- Public rooms for following top tipsters
- Available at https://lasyly.me/rooms

### Sports News
- Curated injury reports, lineup news, and game previews
- Filtered for information relevant to bettors and prop players
- Available at https://lasyly.me/news

### Tipster Marketplace
- Discover and follow sports bettors with verified track records
- Browse tipsters by sport, win rate, and ROI
- Available at https://lasyly.me/tipsters

## Blog

Lasyly publishes guides and analysis for sports bettors:
- How to read prop analytics: https://lasyly.me/blog/how-to-read-prop-analytics
- Why share your betslip: https://lasyly.me/blog/why-share-your-betslip
- NBA player props guide: https://lasyly.me/blog/nba-player-props-guide

## Sitemap

- https://lasyly.me (home)
- https://lasyly.me/analysis (prop analytics)
- https://lasyly.me/scores (live scores)
- https://lasyly.me/rooms (betting rooms)
- https://lasyly.me/news (sports news)
- https://lasyly.me/tipsters (tipster marketplace)
- https://lasyly.me/blog (blog)
- https://lasyly.me/signup (create account)
- https://lasyly.me/login (log in)
- https://lasyly.me/features (feature overview)
